name: mostReadReg
title: mostReadReg
syntax: long mostReadReg(long channel, long chip, dword offset, long regdatalen);
description: Initiates read-out of the registers of a MOST hardware chip.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel to which the hardware is connected.

parameters.name: chip
parameters.description: Number of the chip in the MOST hardware (1 = OS8104; other chips cannot be accessed yet).

parameters.name: regdatalen
parameters.description: Number of registers to be read (1 <= regdatalen <= 16).

return:
See error codes
A read request by mostReadReg() causes the CAPL event procedure OnMostReg to be called.
availability: MOST25 After measurement start Not in Stopmeasurement
MOST25 After measurement start Not in Stopmeasurement
